TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Marcelo_Rebelo_de_Sousa, title = Marcelo_Rebelo_de_Sousa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marcelo_Rebelo_de_Sousa} }

S.FORM: Marcelo Rebelo de Sousa ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 12, Marcelo Rebelo de Sousa, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1948) mrhuw Portugal ta' misuw hya' ga Marcelo Rebelo de Sousa, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Marcelo Rebelo de Sousa ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 12, Marcelo Rebelo de Sousa, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1948) mrhuw Portugal ta' misuw hya' ga Marcelo Rebelo de Sousa, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: marʦ~ʨelo reβelo *e s~ɕous~ɕa rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, marʦ~ʨelo reβelo *e s~ɕous~ɕa, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw portuɣal taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa marʦ~ʨelo reβelo *e s~ɕous~ɕa, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
